briefing: NASDAQ +0.6% and S&P 500 +0.4% was a quiet, neutral session with no strong risk-on catalyst, so we held back from deploying broadly. We added one high-conviction single-stock pick, CBRE, which showed all four confirming signals at once, while leaving the rest of cash in reserve for a clearer risk-on setup. ROAD is trading roughly 9% below its average cost and is near the automatic stop-loss threshold.

daily_lesson.explanation_en: A stop-loss is a predetermined price level at which a losing position is automatically sold to limit further losses, in this portfolio's case set at -7% from the average purchase price. It removes emotion from the decision to cut a loser, since the sale happens automatically once the threshold is breached rather than waiting and hoping the stock recovers.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 停損是指當持股虧損達到預先設定的價格水平時,自動賣出以限制進一步損失,本投資組合的設定為平均成本下跌7%。停損機制能在觸及門檻時自動執行賣出,避免投資人因情緒因素遲遲不願認賠,一直期待股價回升。

market_education.summary_en: Major indices drifted modestly higher today with the NASDAQ up 0.6% and the S&P 500 up 0.4%, a pattern consistent with a quiet, directionless trading session rather than any single dominant headline. No major market-moving news was available in today's feed to point to a specific catalyst. Price action stayed broadly range-bound, with strength concentrated in a handful of individual names showing fresh volume and momentum signals rather than a market-wide rally.
market_education.summary_zh: 今日大盤走勢溫和向上,那斯達克指數上漲0.6%,標普500指數上漲0.4%,屬於缺乏明確催化劑的清淡交易日。今日新聞來源中並無重大市場消息可供引用。價格波動整體維持區間震盪,升勢主要集中在少數個股,這些個股出現成交量放大及動能轉強的訊號,而非全面性的普漲行情。

trades.reasoning: Full multi-signal confirmation (MACD bullish crossover, RSI 57.8 in bullish zone, price above SMA-20, volume surge) shows institutional participation even though the broader market is only neutral today.
